title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: Which gadget or device could you not live without?
Do you think technology has made our lives better or more complicated?
How much do you rely on your smartphone during the day?
Do you think children should be taught to code at school?
What piece of technology do you think has changed the world most?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think we are too dependent on technology in our daily lives?
Should there be limits on how much time children can spend on screens?
How do you think the relationship between humans and technology will change in the future?
